title: anti-legacy Requirements Graph (enriched profile)
description: Tightened overlay of requirements-graph.schema.json, run by GATE_1_DESIGN AFTER enrich_requirements.py. Every requirement MUST carry business_rules (>=1), validations, and error_paths as object-form, ID'd items (RULE-/VAL-/ERR- + three-to-six-digit zero-padded, unique within a requirement). This is the post-migration profile: rule/validation/errorPath items are OBJECT-ONLY here (the transitional string form accepted by the base profile is NOT accepted). Every business_rules item MUST additionally carry a numeric `confidence` in [0,1] (ISS-11): a confidence-less or non-numeric-confidence rule is a HARD GATE_1 validation failure here, not merely a risk-log warning — confidence stays OPTIONAL on validation/errorPath items. The $defs are copied from the base file so the validator does not depend on cross-file $ref resolution; they are intentionally the object branch of the base file's anyOf shapes (the base profile keeps confidence optional + the transitional string branch). IDs wider than 3 digits are emitted automatically when community sub-partitioning still yields >999 members (dense modern codebases such as Apache Kafka).

source_kinds.description: SOURCE-KIND of each grounding fact behind this item (GOTCHA 3). code-body = executable logic read directly; data-def = copybook PIC / level-88 VALUE; comment = inline prose; doc = README / external doc. The trust tier follows the grounding: a rule is trusted_verified ONLY when grounded in code-body and/or data-def; if it rests on comment/doc grounding not confirmed against code, it is untrusted_verified (RISK-eligible). Additive, optional, non-breaking.

disposition.description: Merge+reimagine disposition of this requirement relative to the target state. Set by domain_graph.reconcile_dispositions. `drop` (with a disposition_reason) is excluded from the round-trip rule-coverage gate (compare_graphs.py); a drop WITHOUT a reason is NOT honored and still counts.

disposition_reason.description: Why this requirement carries its disposition. MANDATORY for `drop` to be honored by the round-trip gate — a reason-less drop cannot launder past GATE_3_BUILD.
